name: Flexible Delineator — Spring Post
shortDescription: Spring-loaded flexible bollard marking lanes and hazard zones, springs back after impact.
longDescription: A polyurethane delineator post mounted on a spring base that flexes and springs back upright after a vehicle knock, instead of snapping or staying bent over — used for marking lane edges, hazard zones and temporary exclusion areas that still see occasional vehicle contact.

images.alt: Flexible Delineator — Spring Post supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
